subject: potential sale of gomez lateral pipe

emails.subject: FW: Potential sale of Gomez lateral pipe
emails.subject_base: Potential sale of Gomez lateral pipe
emails.body: FW: Potential sale of Gomez lateral pipe Roger, see note below. Can you please have someone start pulling the ROW files for this pipe? Once they're available, I'd like to review them before we open them up to Pioneer. thanks for the help.

emails.subject: RE: Potential sale of Gomez lateral pipe
emails.subject_base: Potential sale of Gomez lateral pipe
emails.body: RE: Potential sale of Gomez lateral pipe Kevin: We have the TW Gomez Lateral files ready for viewing. I will be back in the office Tuesday morning March 5 if you want to come take a look. Roger Westbrook Enron Transportation Services Right of Way Dept. ECN4650a P.O. Box 1188, Houston, TX 77251-1188 (713) 345-3067 voice (713) 646-3589 fax roger.westbrook@enron.com

emails.subject: RE: Potential sale of Gomez lateral pipe
emails.subject_base: Potential sale of Gomez lateral pipe
emails.body: great, I will touch base Tues.
